commands.review_summary:
The PR adds the existing message-tool-only suppression guard to Telegram's empty-response fallback branch and adds a regression test for a skipped automatic final delivery lane.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +38. Total +39 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main marks non-silent skipped/failed final delivery as fallback-eligible even when the dispatch result is message_tool_only. I did not run tests in this read-only review, so this is source-reproducible rather than locally reproduced.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The patch itself looks mechanically ready, but an external contributor must supply or maintainers must obtain real Telegram proof before merge.
